metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4569
metadata.comment: Rationale: Authors used an antibody generated against rat SIPA1L2 to detect the protein in rat hippocampal cultures. Confocal and super-resolution imaging (STED) shows colocalization of the protein with the presynaptic markers Synaptophysin and Bassoon.. Experimental description: Immunostainings were performed in primary rat cultures. Generation of the antibody used in this study is described in [PMID: 17961154]: "Full-length SPAR2 was cloned and sequenced after screening a k ZAPII (Stratagene, La Jolla, CA, USA) rat total brain cDNA library. (...) The first 93 amino acids of SPAR2 were expressed as glutathione-S- transferase (GST)-tagged fusion proteins in Escherichia coli BL21, purified, and used for generation of rabbit and guinea pig polyclonal antibodies. All antisera were affinity-purified using the appropriate recombinant fusion proteins."
